steps.title: Isolate the absolute value
steps.content: Start with $$-4|5x+6|+4=-20.$$ Subtract $4$ from both sides: $$-4|5x+6|=-24.$$ Divide by $-4$: $$|5x+6|=6.$$

steps.title: Solve the two cases
steps.content: So $5x+6=6$ or $5x+6=-6$. The first gives $5x=0$, so $x=0$. The second gives $5x=-12$, so $x=-\frac{12}{5}$. Both values make $|5x+6|=6$, so the solution set matches choice C.
